title: Hello, Adventure
author: ZorkAI engine team
description: A three-room smoke test for the story format. Solve the puzzle to escape.
intro: You wake on cold stone. The chamber is dim and silent. A heavy iron door bars your way east; on the north wall hangs a faded oil painting.

rooms.name: Sealed Chamber
rooms.description: A small windowless stone room, lit by some unseen source. A heavy iron door is set in the east wall. A faded oil painting hangs on the north wall.

east.blockedMessage: The iron door is locked. There is a small keyhole.

rooms.name: Hallway
rooms.description: A narrow stone corridor stretches east toward daylight. The chamber lies back to the west.

rooms.name: Sunlit Garden
rooms.description: You step out into a wild, overgrown garden. The sun warms your face. You are free.

items.name: oil painting
items.description: A faded portrait of a stern noble. It hangs slightly askew, as though something behind it has shifted.

items.name: small brass key
items.description: A small, worn brass key. It looks like it might fit a lock.

triggers.narration: As you study the painting, you notice it sits just slightly off the wall. Behind it, dangling from a small nail, is a brass key.

winConditions.message: You have escaped into the garden. Adventure complete.
